expectations.text: Q2 options presented each include a layout descriptor (e.g., '· layout: ...')
expectations.evidence: design.md confirms Q2 'Warm Paper' was chosen with CSS signature including '· layout: single centered column, stacked content cards'

expectations.text: Design doc ### Aesthetic Implementation contains a 'Layout structure' field
expectations.evidence: design.md contains 'Layout structure' field in Aesthetic Implementation section

expectations.text: index.html does NOT use a sticky sidebar — uses single-column, stacked cards, or centered column
expectations.evidence: grep for 'sticky' in index.html returns 0 matches; layout is single centered 720px column

expectations.text: The HTML layout matches the layout descriptor of the chosen Q2 option
expectations.evidence: Q2 'Warm Paper' specified single centered column; HTML implements max-width:720px centered single column
